MGATHER.one_liner: Gather-load elements from global memory into a tile using per-element indices.

MSCATTER.one_liner: Scatter-store elements from a tile into global memory using per-element indices.

SETFMATRIX.one_liner: Set FMATRIX register(s) for IMG2COL-like ops.

SET_IMG2COL_PADDING.one_liner: Set IMG2COL padding metadata from an IMG2COL configuration tile.

SET_IMG2COL_RPT.one_liner: Set IMG2COL repeat metadata from an IMG2COL configuration tile.

TABS.one_liner: Elementwise absolute value of a tile.

TADDReluConv.one_liner: Fused elementwise add, ReLU clamp, and type conversion: dst = convert(max(0, src0 + src1)).

TADDS.one_liner: Elementwise add a scalar to a tile.

TADDSC.one_liner: Elementwise fused add with scalar and a second tile: `src0 + scalar + src1`.

TAND.one_liner: Elementwise bitwise AND of two tiles.

TANDS.one_liner: Elementwise bitwise AND of a tile and a scalar.

TASSIGN.one_liner: Bind a Tile object to an implementation-defined on-chip address (manual placement).

TAXPY.one_liner: In-place scaled accumulation (AXPY): dst = scalar * src0 + dst.

TAddDeqRelu.one_liner: Fused elementwise add, dequantization scale, and ReLU clamp: dst = half(max(0, (src0 + src1) * deqScale)).

TBROADCAST.one_liner: Broadcast data from root NPU to all ranks

TCI.one_liner: Generate a contiguous integer sequence into a destination tile.

TCMP.one_liner: Compare two tiles and write a packed predicate mask.

TCMPS.one_liner: Compare a tile against a scalar and write per-element comparison results.

TCOLEXPAND.one_liner: Broadcast the first element of each source column across the destination column.

TCOLEXPANDADD.one_liner: Column-wise broadcast add with per-column scalar vector.

TCOLEXPANDDIV.one_liner: Column-wise broadcast divide: divide each column by a per-column scalar vector.

TCOLEXPANDEXPDIF.one_liner: Column-wise exp-diff: compute exp(src0 - src1) with per-column scalars.

TCOLEXPANDMAX.one_liner: Column-wise broadcast max with per-column scalar vector.

TCOLEXPANDMIN.one_liner: Column-wise broadcast min with per-column scalar vector.

TCOLEXPANDMUL.one_liner: Column-wise broadcast multiply: multiply each column by a per-column scalar vector.

TCOLEXPANDSUB.one_liner: Column-wise broadcast subtract: subtract a per-column scalar vector from each column.

TCOLMAX.one_liner: Reduce each column by taking the maximum across rows.

TCOLMIN.one_liner: Reduce each column by taking the minimum across rows.

TCOLPROD.one_liner: Reduce each column by multiplying across rows.

TCOLSUM.one_liner: Reduce each column by summing across rows.

TCONCAT.one_liner: Concatenate two tiles horizontally along the column dimension.

TCVT.one_liner: Elementwise type conversion with a specified rounding mode.

TDEQUANT.one_liner: Affine dequantization of a quantized tile (S8/S16 -> FP32): dst = (src - offset) * scale.

TDIVS.one_liner: Elementwise division with a scalar (tile/scalar or scalar/tile).

TEXPANDS.one_liner: Broadcast a scalar into a destination tile.

TEXTRACT.one_liner: Extract a sub-tile from a source tile.

TFILLPAD.one_liner: Copy+pad a tile outside the valid region with a compile-time pad value.

TFILLPAD_EXPAND.one_liner: Fill/pad while allowing dst to be larger than src.

TFMODS.one_liner: Elementwise remainder with a scalar: `fmod(src, scalar)`.

TGATHER.one_liner: Gather/select elements using either an index tile or a compile-time mask pattern. / Gather data from all ranks to root NPU

TGEMV.one_liner: General Matrix-Vector multiplication producing an accumulator/output tile.

TGEMV_ACC.one_liner: GEMV with explicit accumulator input/output tiles.

TGEMV_MX.one_liner: GEMV with additional scaling tiles for mixed-precision / quantized matrix-vector compute.

TGET.one_liner: Get data from a remote NPU

TGET_SCALE_ADDR.one_liner: Bind the on-chip address of output tile to a scaled factor of that of input tile.

THISTOGRAM.one_liner: Per-byte histogram (256 bins) over a selected byte of each source element, with optional cascaded upper-byte filtering; the radix-sort bucket-count primitive.

TINSERT.one_liner: Insert a sub-tile into a destination tile at an (indexRow, indexCol) offset.

TLOAD.one_liner: Load data from a GlobalTensor (GM) into a Tile.

TLOG.one_liner: Elementwise natural logarithm of a tile.

TLRELU.one_liner: Leaky ReLU with a scalar slope.

TMATMUL.one_liner: Matrix multiply (GEMM) producing an accumulator/output tile.

TMATMUL_ACC.one_liner: Matrix multiply with accumulator input (fused accumulate).

TMATMUL_MX.one_liner: Matrix multiply (GEMM) with additional scaling tiles for mixed-precision / quantized matmul on supported targets.

TMAXS.one_liner: Elementwise max of a tile and a scalar: `max(src, scalar)`.

TMINS.one_liner: Elementwise minimum of a tile and a scalar.

TMOV.one_liner: Move/copy between tiles, optionally applying implementation-defined conversion modes.

TMOV_FP.one_liner: Move/convert from an accumulator tile into a destination tile, using a scaling (`fp`) tile for vector quantization parameters.

TMRGSORT.one_liner: Merge sort for multiple sorted lists (implementation-defined element format and layout).

TMULS.one_liner: Elementwise multiply a tile by a scalar.

TNOT.one_liner: Elementwise bitwise NOT of a tile.

TNOTIFY.one_liner: Notify other ranks of an event

TOR.one_liner: Elementwise bitwise OR of two tiles.

TORS.one_liner: Elementwise bitwise OR of a tile and a scalar.

TPARTADD.one_liner: Partial elementwise add with implementation-defined handling of mismatched valid regions.

TPARTMAX.one_liner: Partial elementwise max with implementation-defined handling of mismatched valid regions.

TPARTMIN.one_liner: Partial elementwise min with implementation-defined handling of mismatched valid regions.

TPARTMUL.one_liner: Partial elementwise multiply with implementation-defined handling of mismatched valid regions.

TPREFETCH.one_liner: Prefetch data from global memory into a tile-local cache/buffer (hint).

TPREFETCH_ASYNC.one_liner: Asynchronously prefetch a GlobalTensor region from GM into L2 cache via SDMA CMO.

TPRELU.one_liner: Elementwise PReLU (parametric ReLU) with a per-element slope tile.

TPUT.one_liner: Put data to a remote NPU

TQUANT.one_liner: Quantize a tile (e.g. FP32 to FP8) producing exponent/scaling/max outputs.

TREMS.one_liner: Elementwise remainder with a scalar: `remainder(src, scalar)`.

TRESHAPE.one_liner: Reinterpret a tile as another tile type/shape while preserving the underlying bytes.

TROWARGMAX.one_liner: Get the column index of the maximum element for each row.

TROWARGMIN.one_liner: Get the column index of the minimum element for each row.

TROWEXPAND.one_liner: Broadcast the first element of each source row across the destination row.

TROWEXPANDADD.one_liner: Row-wise broadcast add: add a per-row scalar vector.

TROWEXPANDDIV.one_liner: Row-wise broadcast divide: divide each row of `src0` by a per-row scalar vector `src1`.

TROWEXPANDEXPDIF.one_liner: Row-wise exp-diff: compute exp(src0 - src1) with per-row scalars.

TROWEXPANDMAX.one_liner: Row-wise broadcast max with a per-row scalar vector.

TROWEXPANDMIN.one_liner: Row-wise broadcast min with a per-row scalar vector.

TROWEXPANDMUL.one_liner: Row-wise broadcast multiply: multiply each row of `src0` by a per-row scalar vector `src1`.

TROWEXPANDSUB.one_liner: Row-wise broadcast subtract: subtract a per-row scalar vector `src1` from each row of `src0`.

TROWMAX.one_liner: Reduce each row by taking the maximum across columns.

TROWMIN.one_liner: Reduce each row by taking the minimum across columns.

TROWSUM.one_liner: Reduce each row by summing across columns.

TSCATTER.one_liner: Scatter source elements into a destination tile using per-element flattened offsets. / Scatter data from root NPU to all ranks

TSEL.one_liner: Select between two tiles using a mask tile (per-element selection).

TSELS.one_liner: Select one of two source tiles using a scalar `selectMode` (global select).

TSHLS.one_liner: Elementwise shift-left a tile by a scalar.

TSHRS.one_liner: Elementwise shift-right a tile by a scalar.

TSORT32.one_liner: Sort a fixed-size 32-element block and produce an index mapping.

TSTORE.one_liner: Store data from a Tile into a GlobalTensor (GM), optionally using atomic write or quantization parameters.

TSTORE_FP.one_liner: Store an accumulator tile into global memory using a scaling (`fp`) tile for vector quantization parameters.

TSUBRELU.one_liner: Elementwise subtract then ReLU of two tiles.

TSUBS.one_liner: Elementwise subtract a scalar from a tile.

TSUBVIEW.one_liner: Reinterpret a tile as a subtile of another tile.

TSYNC.one_liner: Synchronize PTO execution (wait on events or insert a per-op pipeline barrier).

TTEST.one_liner: Test if a notification has been received

TTRANS.one_liner: Transpose with an implementation-defined temporary tile.

TXOR.one_liner: Elementwise bitwise XOR of two tiles.

TXORS.one_liner: Elementwise bitwise XOR of a tile and a scalar.
